name: HNS_NOTES
description: HNS NOTES. This table stores all the notes. Notes are primarily CLOB column and stored separately.

columns.Name: NOTES_ID
columns.Comments: NOTES_ID unique identifer. Primary key for table HNS_NOTES.

columns.Name: AUTHOR_ID
columns.Comments: Author identifier for a NOTES. Author  is an employee who add comments to the note.

columns.Name: NOTES_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Notes Create Date column. Date autopopulated once a note is created.

columns.Name: NOTES
columns.Comments: Notes clob column. This column is an append only column.

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Task Identifier. Task is defined as either incident_id, investigation_id or action_id.

columns.Name: UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: The person / owner who updated the note. Note is an append only column. It can only be updated.

columns.Name: UPDATED_DATE
columns.Comments: UPDATE_DATE column: The date the note got updated.

columns.Name: TASK_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of task i.e. Incident, Investigation or Action.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
